next_steps: Study the worked example: npm install && npx hyperframes preview (6-segment, ~2min launch video)
Read BUILD_KIT.md — segment skeleton, shared component CSS, helpers (fadeIn/countUp/typewrite/stamp), per-segment specs
Optional screen capture: the repo/ dir is a Playwright capture stack (run_demo.py + capture/) — record your product flow to use as real footage
Write SCRIPT.md (hook → reveal → demo beats → use cases → CTA), one segment per beat
Voiceover: edit voiceover/segments.json, run the skill's scripts/tts.py — or drop MP3s into voiceover/
Transcribe each MP3 (npx hyperframes transcribe), edit voiceover/cues_spec.json, run scripts/extract_cues.py
Rebuild compositions/seg1-6.html against the BUILD_KIT skeleton with your cues
QA: lint && validate && inspect --samples 60; extract frames; draft render then HQ
